scripts.deploy:staging: ng build --configuration staging && cd .. && firebase deploy --only hosting:staging --project gen-lang-client-0189172552
scripts.deploy:prod: ng build --configuration production && cd .. && firebase deploy --only hosting:prod --project gen-lang-client-0189172552
scripts.backend:staging: gcloud builds submit ../backend --tag gcr.io/gen-lang-client-0189172552/csn-api-staging:latest --project gen-lang-client-0189172552 && gcloud run deploy csn-api-staging --image gcr.io/gen-lang-client-0189172552/csn-api-staging:latest --region us-central1 --platform managed --allow-unauthenticated --set-secrets DATABASE_URL=csn-database-url-staging:latest,SECRET_KEY=csn-secret-key-staging:latest --set-env-vars ENVIRONMENT=staging --memory 512Mi --cpu 1 --min-instances 0 --max-instances 5 --project gen-lang-client-0189172552
scripts.backend:prod: gcloud builds submit ../backend --tag gcr.io/gen-lang-client-0189172552/csn-api-prod:latest --project gen-lang-client-0189172552 && gcloud run deploy csn-api-prod --image gcr.io/gen-lang-client-0189172552/csn-api-prod:latest --region us-central1 --platform managed --allow-unauthenticated --set-secrets DATABASE_URL=csn-database-url-prod:latest,SECRET_KEY=csn-secret-key-prod:latest --set-env-vars ENVIRONMENT=production --memory 1Gi --cpu 2 --min-instances 1 --max-instances 10 --project gen-lang-client-0189172552
